title: Boat cars
description: This resource pack replace boat for 17 unique cars.
body:
This is updated version. Original [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/boat-cars/).

## Requires 
[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).

## Preview

**All cars**
![All cars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EFPfbrP/images/f45e28876f69fd4a61741e7d54ba27c6dbf5b5cf.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Mazda MX5**
![Mazda MX5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EFPfbrP/images/00ff97173df92088adc7fe2f6a5bfa7abf122bf7.jpeg)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Mitsubishi Eclipse**
![Mitsubishi Eclipse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EFPfbrP/images/210e7c4e424d8a48137c80cb790d7e8341cf7c01.jpeg)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Nissan Skyline R34 and Honda Prelude**
![Nissan Skyline R34 and Honda Prelude](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EFPfbrP/images/e55ec36bc5119c5557e7384cd0ce27a486ed1658.jpeg)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Mazda RX7**
![Mazda RX7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EFPfbrP/images/04c8839b751f86146f9e58a5aea59be907b00860.jpeg)

**Toyota AE86**
![Toyota AE86](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EFPfbrP/images/d476cc1ea2ba54f5142620b770dce1ec18445076.jpeg)

**Car meeting**
![Car meeting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EFPfbrP/images/67617f73f948e3820c7b6deeb6b189924dd77b5d.jpeg)

## All cars
- Oak boat = **Nissan Skyline R34**
- Oak boat with chest = **Nissan 240SX**
- Birch boat = **Subaru Impreza**
- Birch boat with chest = **Nissan Silvia S13**
- Spruce boat = **Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 9**
- Spruce boat with chest = **Mazda RX7 FD**
- Jungle boat = **Honda Integra**
- Jungle boat with chest = **Honda Prelude**
- Acacia boat = **Mitsubishi Eclipse**
- Acacia boat with chest = **Mazda MX5**
- Dark oak boat = **Ford Shelby**
- Dark oak boat with chest = **Toyota MR2**
- Mangrove boat = **Chevrolet Camaro**
- Mangrove boat with chest = **Mazda RX7 FC**
- Cherry boat = **Subaru BRZ**
- Cherry boat with chest = **Toyota AE86**
- Bamboo raft with chest = **Honda Civic 6G**
